sql_array: CREATE TABLE test_strings (id UInt32, plaintext String) ENGINE = MergeTree ORDER BY id;
INSERT INTO test_strings VALUES (1, 'Hello World'), (2, 'Base58 Encode Test'), (3, 'SQL Fuzzing'), (4, '');
SELECT base58Encode(plaintext) FROM test_strings WHERE id > 0;
SELECT base58Encode(plaintext) FROM test_strings WHERE id IN (SELECT id FROM test_strings WHERE LENGTH(plaintext) > 0);
CREATE TABLE test_numbers (num1 Int32, num2 Int32) ENGINE = MergeTree ORDER BY num1;
SELECT base58Encode(plaintext), COUNT(*) FROM test_strings GROUP BY base58Encode(plaintext) HAVING COUNT(*) > 1;
SELECT base58Encode(plaintext - 'Test') FROM test_strings WHERE id = 1;
SELECT SUM(num1) / NULLIF(SUM(num2), 0) AS ratio FROM test_numbers;
SELECT base58Encode(CONCAT(plaintext, ' Test')) FROM test_strings HAVING LENGTH(plaintext) < 10 ORDER BY plaintext;
CREATE TABLE test_composite (id UInt32, num Int32, str String) ENGINE = MergeTree ORDER BY id;
INSERT INTO test_composite VALUES (1, 100, 'Base58'), (2, 0, 'Encode'), (3, -1000, 'Edge Case'), (4, 100, NULL);
SELECT base58Encode(str) - 'A' FROM test_composite WHERE num >= 0;
SELECT base58Encode(str || base58Encode(num) || ' is encoded') FROM test_composite WHERE num IS NOT NULL;
SELECT base58Encode('Encoded Value: ' || (num1 + num2)) FROM test_numbers;
